design_philosophy.core_concept: Digital Detox Aesthetics - Technology that feels like nature

usage_rules.headings: Manrope, font-bold or font-extrabold for H1/H2. Use tight tracking (tracking-tight). Color: Deep Forest Green.
usage_rules.body: DM Sans, font-normal. Relaxed line-height (leading-relaxed). Color: Dark Slate/Olive.
usage_rules.numbers: Manrope (it has tabular figures for dashboards).

colors.palette_description: A soft, organic palette inspired by nature. Avoid pure black and pure white.

layout.spacing_system: Use generous padding. Cards should have p-6 or p-8. Section gaps should be gap-8 or gap-12.

grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid: Mixed span sizes. 12-column grid. Key metric (e.g., Weight Goal) takes col-span-4 row-span-2. Smaller metrics take col-span-2.
grid_system.landing_page: Asymmetric Tetris Grid for features. Hero section full width with overlay.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use subtle glass for sticky headers: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/20.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]. Avoid harsh black shadows.
visual_enhancers.gradients: No linear gradients. Use radial gradients for backgrounds (e.g., a soft sun glow in the corner).
visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to the background to make it feel like paper.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95). Cards lift on hover (-translate-y-1).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-base font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-8 py-6

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border shadow-sm rounded-3xl p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-md

charts.style: Minimal axes. Use curved lines (monotone). Hide grid lines or make them very subtle dashed.

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 transition-colors focus:outline-none

image_strategy.style_guide: Natural light, candid moments, connection with nature. Avoid staged studio shots.

hero_bg.alt: Woman doing yoga in front of sun
hero_bg.position: Hero Section Background or Side Visual

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1) for dashboard cards.
motion.hover: Scale 1.02 for cards. Icon rotation for buttons.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is Deep Forest Green on Sage backgrounds.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and font families.
Update index.css with the CSS variables provided.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the sidebar/header structure.
Use the Bento Grid layout for the main Dashboard view.
Ensure the Landing Page uses the provided images in a visually striking way (e.g., full-height hero).
For the Login/Register pages, use a split layout: Image on one side, Form on the other.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters.
